title: Skyward Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Redemption loop in redeem_skyward function allowing repeated withdrawals

prevention.rule: Block any tx that repeatedly calls redeem_skyward() with the same parameters in the same transaction
prevention.trigger: REDEEM_SKYWARD -> same token_account_ids in single tx

red_flags: Repeated calls to redeem_skyward() with the same parameters in the same transaction
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that repeatedly calls redeem_skyward() with the same parameters in the same transaction
summary: The exploit involved a loop in the redeem_skyward function which allowed the attacker to repeatedly withdraw tokens from the treasury. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for repeated calls to the function with the same parameters in a single transaction.
